name: 火弹术
description: 凝聚火行灵气于指端，催作一枚灼热火弹掷出，及地炸开一团烈焰，灼伤波及四周。最基础的火行攻击法术，凡引气入体者皆可习练。威力由灵气强度与火行极化决定，与境界、功法相关，而非苦练熟巧。
//en_us_description: Gather Fire-phase qi at your fingertip and hurl it as a searing bolt; it bursts into flame on impact, scorching everything nearby. The most basic Fire-phase attack spell — anyone who can draw qi into the body may learn it. Its power is set by qi power and Fire polarization (i.e. realm and technique), not by drilling proficiency.
//: 本 mod 第一个主动攻击法术,确立攻击法术范式：effect:attack + shape:blast + damage_type:heat,消耗灵气（energy_source vitamin qi）。**定位为「法术」（无门槛）**：凡能引气入体者皆可学,故不设 spell_class（不会凭空把人变成修士）——施放门槛由 energy_source:qi 天然承担（没灵气放不出）。**威力 = 基础 × 灵气强度系数 × 火行极化**：强度系数 immortal_path_qi_power()/100（基础修士 1.0、炼气圆满约 2.0）,火行极化 immortal_path_polarization_fire()（基础 1、修火行功法 1.3）。**熟练度（spell level）不参与威力**,只影响施法时间与成功率（max_level 仍在,见 doc/spell-design.md「术的熟练度只节省时间/提高成功率」）。explosion_light:immortal_path_fireball_blast 让范围视觉走 fork 现代火焰光效（recipe 在 mod 自有 vfx/explosion_lights.json）。译名查 GLOSSARY。/ The mod's first active attack spell; establishes the attack pattern. Classed as a no-prerequisite 'art' (no spell_class, so reading the scroll won't turn anyone into a cultivator; the qi cost gates casting). Power = base × (qi_power/100) × fire_polarization; spell level affects only cast time and success, not power. explosion_light routes the blast through the fork's modern fire visual.

name: 寒泉迸
description: 引水行至阴之气凝于掌心，催作一道激射的寒泉掷出，及地迸裂四溅，刺骨寒涛冲击周遭。基础水行攻击法术，凡引气入体者皆可习练。威力由灵气强度与水行极化决定，与境界、功法相关，而非苦练熟巧。
//en_us_description: Gather the utmost-yin qi of Water in your palm and loose it as a lancing jet of cold spring-water; it bursts on impact, the bone-chilling surge slamming everything nearby. A basic Water-phase attack spell — anyone who can draw qi into the body may learn it. Its power is set by qi power and Water polarization (i.e. realm and technique), not by drilling proficiency.
//: 水行入门攻击法术,与火弹术同范式（attack + blast + 消耗灵气）,作为「法术·无门槛」第二个范例、首个水行/cold 攻击法术。**无 spell_class**（凡引气入体者皆可学,施放门槛由 energy_source:qi 承担）。**威力 = 基础 × 灵气强度系数 × 水行极化**：immortal_path_qi_power()/100 × immortal_path_polarization_water()（修水行功法时 1.3）。**熟练度不参与威力**,只影响施法时间与成功率。damage_type:cold（水属性的伤害归口,与冰系预留通道区分——本术走水行极化 polarization_water,非冰）。无 IGNITE 类 flag。explosion_light:immortal_path_water_burst_blast 走 fork 现代光效的水蓝迸溅配色。译名查 GLOSSARY。/ Water-phase entry attack, same pattern as Fireball; the second no-prerequisite art and the first Water/cold attack. No spell_class. Power = base × (qi_power/100) × water_polarization; spell level affects only cast time and success. damage_type cold (Water's damage outlet; uses polarization_water, distinct from the reserved ice channel). explosion_light routes the burst through the fork's modern visual in a water-blue palette.
